entry.title: Re: Multiple creates in one POST call for a RAP business object

entry.title: Re: SAVE Attachments in ABAP Restful programming managed Fiori App
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Not able to get Flavour Creation option in SAP Screen...
entry.content:
Everything is working fine in your system. We were able to connect and saw that Personas operates as expected. Check your incident.

You should remove all service parameters you added to service personas3. Those are only needed for service personas. Also, you can remove the theme parameter for sap_bluecrystal, since that will not work / superfluous in your S/4HANA 2021 system.

entry.title: Basic Data 2 view is not showing as an option
entry.content: OMS2 on any material type is showing just "Basic Data" in material master.  However, only Basic Data 1 view is showing.  We are missing Basic Data 2 view.  Please advise.

entry.title: Wrong Naming of CC Instances during Installation
entry.content:
Dear SAP CC experts, 

While installing SAP CC 5.0.6 on a Linux Distribution in an integrated scenario with SAP CI, we named the instances: 

  • Rater#1
  • Bulkloader#2
  • Dispatcher#3
  • Updater#4
  • Guider#5

Normally the instance IDs were named so. This caused an issue because Bulkloader#2 could not read the charged items files and process them to load in CI as it was expecting to load the files from rater#2 based on the default parameters. To fix this we changed the POSTPAID_CIT_READER_ROOT_PATH and the POSTPAID_CIT_WRITER_ROOT_PATH and the BITs were created normally in CI then. Rather than this, we could not encounter any other problem related to this matter.

As the INSTANCE_ID can't be changed, what would be the best approach to changing the naming of these instances as advised by SAP? Is only the Removal of Instances from the host and adding instances the only solution?

@francois_thimon do you see any other consequence if we decide to keep the above naming to the instances?

Thank you,

Doris

entry.title: Enhanced SAP Business Network Intelligent Invoice Conversion for Country-Specific Fields (India)
entry.content:
SAP Business Network's Intelligent Invoice Conversion (IIC) now supports country-specific invoice fields, starting with India. This enhancement allows extraction of fields mandated by local tax authorities from PDF or scanned invoices. Suppliers can set up templates for annotating country-specific data, ensuring compliance with local regulations.

Key Points:

  • Support for PDF Invoices: Facilitates extraction of mandated fields from supplier or tax authority provided data.
  • Initial Release: Focuses on India, with plans for broader support.
  • Prerequisites: Suppliers must be onboarded to IIC and use tax authority cleared invoices.
  • Restrictions: IIC does not send extracted data for tax clearance and lacks specific validation for India.

Changes: New capability to annotate and process country-specific invoices using customizable templates.

For more details, visit the SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: CK11N Issue (Standard Cost Estimate)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am having issue running ck11n for a FG subcontracting material , I have provided a screenshot below. I looked into the view details and was unable to resolve the issue.

entry.title: Sending Invoices via Email with SAP Business Network's Intelligent Invoice Conversion
entry.content:
SAP Business Network's Intelligent Invoice Conversion (IIC) now supports the upload of PDF or scanned paper invoices via email, simplifying the submission process for suppliers. This new feature allows suppliers to email their invoices to SAP Business Network, where they are extracted and converted using existing templates.

Prerequisites:

  • Onboarding to IIC service.
  • Using a standard email client to send invoices.
  • Configuring a sender mailbox to receive responses.

Restrictions:

  • Up to three email addresses can be configured.
  • ANID of the SAP Business Network buyer account must be in the email subject line.

Changes:

  • New "Email upload setup" section in the Invoice Conversion Template Configuration page.

This enhancement streamlines the invoice submission process, making it more flexible and efficient for suppliers. For more information, visit the SAP Help Portal.

entry.title: Can the Drill to Detail table view in the WFA dashboard be formatted
entry.content:
Is there a way to customize the look of the drill-in table? The current appearance is hard to read with the varying text fonts, sizes, italics, colours, etc.
Additionally, can different drill-in tables be set for different contexts? For example, if we want the drill-in table to display different metrics for a Headcount drill-in VS a Recruitment drill-in. In HANA Admin, I am only seeing a single drill-in section so far.

Please check the screenshot attached for details.

Thanks,
Rup

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: A couple of curve balls in there to make things interesting. Thanks for this:

entry.title: How to migrate G/L accounts to SAP S/4HANA in a greenfield implementation?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

My team is working on a greenfield S/4HANA implementation, since we're migrating from an SAP ECC to an SAP S/4HANA 2023 Cloud Private Edition. With this in mind, we'd like to know if:

  • Are there any tools or applications we could use to migrate our current G/L accounts to the new SAP S/4HANA system?

Thanks for your support!

Best regards,
Implementation team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to migrate G/L accounts to SAP S/4HANA in a green...
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Yes, we have a Fiori application specifically for data migration, and it's called "Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit"! For more information about the app's functionalities, we suggest reading its official documentation:

  • Migrate Your Data - Migration Cockpit | SAP Help Portal

As the documentation above explains, the app uses two different approaches to migrate data: Direct Transfer, in which you can use certain SAP systems as sources of data migration (like your SAP ECC) to migrate data, and Staging Tables, which is based on migrating data filled in CSV or XML template files, not requiring other source systems to be used. The app then migrates data by logically grouping it through Migration Objects (like Customer, Supplier, Product and so on).

Since you're migrating to an SAP S/4HANA 2023 Cloud Private Edition, you can check the following link to see the available Migration Objects for your system and release:

  • Available Migration Objects | SAP Help Portal

In the link above, you can search for the different G/L Migration Objects available, and use the one(s) that most suit(s) your needs. For instance, the Migration Object "FI - G/L account" is available for both the Direct Transfer and Staging Tables migration approaches:

  • FI - G/L account (Direct Transfer) | SAP Help Portal
  • FI - G/L account (Staging Tables) | SAP Help Portal

I hope this helps with your query and good luck with the greenfield implementation!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: how to read topology.ini from a tenant database?
entry.content: Can anyone know how to read topology.ini from a tenant database? Thank You!

entry.title: SAP Disclosure Management standard taxonomy for Colombia by SAP
entry.content:
Hi, everybody

I tryed to found the file standard Base.zip base taxonomy for Colombia provided by SAP, but i don´t found this file. I need to help, please.
In the guide for create XBRL Filing for the Superintencia Financiera de Colombia, it say that i should the SFC taxonomy is available for download and unzip the content of the SFC taxonomy into a temp subdirectory. After I should download the standard Base.zip base taxonomy for Colombia provided by SAP and  unzip the taxonomy intoanother temp directory.
Also I merge both content by moving the SFC taxonomy files into the
https\www.superfinanciera.gov.co\xbrl\ifrs\2015-01-01 subdirectory of the Base Taxonomy.

Without this file standard Base.zip base taxonomy for Colombia provided by SAP, I can´t merge the files and I can´t continue with the process.

Can you help me? Thank you

entry.content: Can anyone know How to check the lanscape id from tenant database? Thank you

entry.title: Re: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting activity in CBC
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @KhaingZinTun ,

to set up statutory reporting for your (customer's) organization please follow this guidance in SAP Help: Setting Up Your Statutory Reporting | SAP Help Portal. The first chapter, "Create Statutory Reporting Entities", lists the considerations for setting up new entities. 

A tip for future How-to questions: First, please assess the official SAP product documentation (SAP Help), SAP Best Practices (at Solution Scenarios | SAP Signavio Process Navigator | SAP for Me) with their pertinent scope items, process flow diagrams, setup guides and standard test scripts. Those establish the 'ground truth'. If they do not answer your questions, please continue as you did, looking into the SAP Community for further support and asking for answers. 

Thank you. If this solves your request, please mark accordingly.

Dean.

I mean, in São Paulo and Rio de Janeiro cities, which are the ones located for NFses in Brazil. But if there is a way to anothers cities it will help too.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Attachment being sent without attachment header
entry.content: I use i_attachment_type = 'EXT' for any type of binary file (xlsx, pdf, etc.), but I don't know if it solves, and why 'BIN' works or not depending on your systems.

Thanks.

entry.title: MFS for EWM ports, do you have a guideline from SAP? A consultant used port 2000 and 2002
entry.content:
A consultant used port 2000 and 2002 to work with PLC, they are using the telegram and have a group of plcs, he started using ports 20000 and 22000, but then he set some PLCs to 2000 and 2002.

When the channel was started the reserved port 2000 was enabled with an inactive service and the channel obviously didn't work.

All the team started to demand a solution, looking to this issue the voip and port 2000 2001 where reserved. We asked to move them but he demanded to open it.

 

Do you have a guideline for ports being used, looked in SAP notes, opened a case, looked on the ports of suse linux 15 , but there is no infor about this.

Do not allow Telegram channels to use any kind of port, the transcation does not validate the port number.

entry.title: Re: Assign reporting category in Setting Up Your Statutor...
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @KhaingZinTun.

The business scope of Document and Reporting Compliance, scope item 5XU, and possibly 78L, is not activated by default. 5XU might require additional licensing (contact SAP's or SAP Partner's Account Executive). For scope item activation, please follow SAP Note 3122430, Scope Item Activation.

Please not the links are for region US. You may want to adapt the URLs for your target region.     

If this solves your request, please mark accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Thank You

entry.title: How to use the old "where used list" in public cloud?
entry.content:
How to use the old "where used list" in public cloud?

I would like to check which reports (apps) contain the a field.

Example: customer want to check in finance / accounts receivable apps - could be any related to sales finance, a relation between finance flow and Nota Fiscal number that Brazil cities hall sent back after NFse approval. (table =J_1BNFE_ACTIVE  field = NFSE_NUMBER ).

 

So, how can i check which reports contain this field mapped in public cloud?

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft PowerPoint
entry.content: Are there any limitations of this functionality based on a live Datasphere datasource? Right now there are many limitations of SAC functionality on live Datasphere connections.

entry.title: Re: How to archive EBAN data with specific criteria
entry.content:
Hello @limyi 

Here are the details on Archiving Purchase Requisitions procedure.

The standard pre-processing program RM06BV70 doesn't provide selection criteria by purchase order number in the EBAN table.

I can see two ways forward:

  1. Select all the purchase requisitions that you want to delete and enter the directly into the pre-processing step of MM_EBAN archiving. You can use standard MM-PUR reports or SE16 over the EBAN table. That approach is ok if the number of purchase requisitions is fairly limited. Execute the pre-processing step and follow with the archiving next steps.
  2. Develop a custom report as described in the note 2666219 - Deletion flag indicator can not be used with MEMASSRQ - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA. Use the report to set the deletion flag in the purchase requisitions to be archived. Then continue with the archiving process starting with the write step. The development of the custom report is justified if you have substantial number of purchase requisitions to archive.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Mass update in S/4 HANA EAM : Mass Editing Header Det...
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @Riyaj .

You may be able to assess further the functional capabilities of scope item 43R, Maintenance Resource Scheduling, by exploring the solution diagram in the SAP Signavio Process Navigator for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2402 or 2408). Click onto an activity to find out about the respective associated SAP Fiori app. Here I clicked on 'Assign one or multiple technicians' on a maintenance order and got Fiori app F2603, Maintenance Scheduling Board, to show. 

Does this give you some perspective toward answering your question?

entry.title: Re: MFS for EWM ports, do you have a guideline from SAP?...
entry.content:
Hello @tiznda1 

I don't think there are any SAP guidelines on port numbers to be used for PLC communication. That really depends on your network topology and other services used.

If the consultant could set some PLC ports to 20000 and 22000 and others to 2000 and 2002, it should not be a problem to set PLCs to use ports that are not reserved by other services. 

Honestly I don't understand the consultant's attitude demanding port opening. A consultant is in no position to demand anything. They are to do the job according to customer requirements. If the consultant doesn't understand that, maybe it's time to replace them.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.content:

When I go to approve a termination workflow, I receive the error "user must have an active employment record to be terminated."  When I close out of the error and look at the employees Job Info, it shows they are still active, and shows the termination was still approved.  Any idea why I get this error pop-up if the approval is still going through?

entry.title: Salary Ranges on Job Profile

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content:
Why do you want to do an union select?

Just select the entries from EINE and do an inner join to EINA on INFNR.

entry.title: Login in a S/4 Cloud Public Edition in a unattended process automation
entry.content:
Hi Builders,

I've developed a unattended bot that execute some tasks in a S/4 Cloud Public Edition environment.

To login in the S/4 Cloud system I have developed some steps in the automation so the bot informs the user and password. And it is working fine.

However, I am investigating if there is a more robust and secure way to make the bot login in a S/4 Cloud Edition. Does anyone knows what is SAP recommendation for this scenario?

I have found SAP recommendation to login in a SAP on-premisse system but nothing about cloud systems.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Report Story Widget Showing Incorrect Total because of Blank Row
entry.content:
Hi Everyone!

I have a report story that has Comp Planning and Variable pay. The widgets count associate ID's with what type of bonus payouts. When proxying as a manager running it shows an extra blank line (all dashes) assuming its their own data but its throwing the totals off of my widgets to show 1 person which is not correct. It should see zero I don't know how to remove it because as a superadmin it doesn't appear for me to remove it as I see everyone.

entry.title: 🇵🇹 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Lisbona, PT)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

You'll become acquainted with how embedded Machine Learning in SAP HANA can be used to build ML models. In working through this CodeJam you'll also become familiar with how the SAP Business Application Studio can be used to work with Jupyter notebooks.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Wednesday, September 25th, in Porto Salvo, Portugal 🇵🇹 from 10:00 to 16:00 WEST (UTC+1). The language of the event and the content will be in English. 

The instructor is a Developer Advocate Vitaliy Rudnytskiy.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-ml-py-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

The event is being hosted by SAP Portugal at
SAP Portugal, Lagoas Park Edificio 14,
Porto Salvo, Portugal

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 40 attendees.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: DOMAIN using UNIT data type
entry.content: I created a DOMAIN using UNIT data tye. I want to give value range and want to create help while creating entries and at selection screen help. How to do it?

entry.title: Re: How to get started with Business Process Management?
entry.content:
Hi Taryn; 

Thank you so much for sharing your blog.  

The information you've shared provides a comprehensive guide on starting with Business Process Management (BPM), focusing on the importance of governance as a foundational element

My understanding of your blog is as follows:

  1. Holistic Approach: Provides a comprehensive view of BPM, addressing governance, methods, and tools to ensure a well-rounded implementation.
  2. Governance Focus: Emphasizes starting with governance to establish a strong foundation, which is crucial for successful BPM.
  3. Strategic Alignment: Stresses the importance of aligning BPM initiatives with organizational strategic goals and KPIs, ensuring that efforts deliver tangible business value.
  4. Framework Utilization: Advocates for using existing frameworks and building blocks to support BPM efforts, offering structured guidance and best practices.
  5. Practical Path Selection: Offers practical advice on selecting the right BPM path based on organizational maturity, resources, and existing projects.
  6. Continuous Improvement: Highlights the need for ongoing refinement of governance, processes, and tools, reinforcing the iterative nature of BPM.
  7. Future Insights: Promises follow-up content on BPM governance and setting up a BPM Process Office, providing a roadmap for further learning and application.

Overall, your blog is an extremely valuable approach for its structured guidance, practical advice, and focus on strategic alignment and continuous improvement.

Questions:

1.  On your BPM Methodology graph, why do you have so many processes for disciplines?

Your blog does mention processes for each BPM discipline but doesn’t delve deeply into why multiple processes exist. It focuses more on the importance of governance and foundational building blocks rather than detailing the complexity of the methodology graph.  Why are there so many process disciplines?

2.  In many cases governance is not something in our control, we normally apply the BPM process when we want to apply lean. Where would we start after the governance part?

Your blog focuses on governance. The blog suggests starting with governance but doesn’t extensively address what to do if governance has already been in place or is out of control or how to proceed directly after governance. It implies that after establishing governance, one should move to the BPM Process Management Lifecycle.

I can't wait to read more.....

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam in Lisbon
entry.content: The event has been scheduled: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-lisbona-pt/ec-p/13773843#M544

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Learning - can an admin deactivate mor...
entry.content:
We were able to test this method successfully on our staging environment with just a single row of user data. Required fields are:

  1. INSTRUCTOR ID
  2. ACTIVE (set to "NO")
  3. DOMAIN ID (formatted as text if you have leading zeroes to retain)
  4. ROLE ID
  5. ...and though it is not labelled as required, EMAIL.

We populated the template (EntityTemplate_Instructor) with one row of user data, applied the "NO" setting to the ACTIVE column, and used the "Update" import option. The existing instructor account was successfully changed from active to inactive. Thanks again, Marc!

entry.title: Trying to access XSA UAA via browser and getting The subdomain does not map to a valid identity zone
entry.content:
Hello, I have installed the HANA Express and XSA on the AWS EC2 instance. Everything is OK, I can access the xs using xs l command in terminal and can list apps via xs apps. But when I try to access the XS Cockpit in the browser, I get redirected to the https://public_dns_of_the_ec2:39032/uaa-security/oauth/authorize - which is fine I think since I need to login first. But the thing is that on that URL, I get:

I did find on the internet that I need to update the xs-uaa.json which is located here:
/hana/shared/HXE/xs/uaaserver/tomcat/webapps/uaa-security/WEB-INF/classes/xs_uaa.json and to add the redirect_uris, which I did:

{
"xsappname": "uaa",
"scopes": [
{
"name": "uaa.user",
"description": "Default scope for user",
"granted-apps": ["xs_user","*"]
}
],
"redirect_uris": [
"https://ec2-public-ip.eu-central-1.compute.amazonaws.com/*",
"https://public-ip/*"
]
}

I have restarted Hana using HDB stop and HDB start, but still facing the same issue.

Does anyone knows how I can fix this, so that I can access the XS Cockpit via browser?

entry.title: Is the Application Job fiori app also available in BTP ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are doing some analysis and we are wondering whether the Application Job fiori app is also available for use for jobs templates created in BTP ABAP? From the library, it says it is available in S/4HANA and S/4HANA cloud.

However, we saw that it is also available in BTP ABAP as per SAP documentation.

Application Jobs | SAP Help Portal

Unfortunately, for trials users, we won't know if it is available unless we have the roles required to access the fiori tile.

Another observation I made is that the BSP application for the fiori app seems to be available in the BTP instance too.

With this, is it same to assume that the app will be there as long as we have installed the required components?

@ThomasSchneider , would you be able to confirm this?

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content: I also want the row in the EINA table...

entry.title: SAC Script has got no IF (... OR ...) ?
entry.content:
Hi,

PROBLEM:
-A SAC Script with a logic like IF ( condition OR  condition OR ..condition){}  is needed.
-SAC Script or SAP SAC Script Documentation does not provide
info about the possible syntax for  IF (){} at all ?

SOLUTION:
Is there for  SAP Script another logice than if (...=== ...){} at all possible ?
Anybody has got an ideas if at all and how  to run an IF ( ... OR ...) within SAC  Script ? 

 

PROBLEM IN DETAIL:
-have got a BW Query with 10 Variables  Z_QUERY_VAR_01 ... Z_QUERY_VAR_10.
-want  to run operations only on the variables: Z_QUERY_VAR_01 ..._03.
- a SAC Script with an or OR to build the descired logic  ist set up

var filterName = MANAGREP.getDataSource().getVariables();
for ( var j=0; j < filterName.length; j++){
// OR does not seem to work :
if(    ( filterName[j].id === "Z_QUERY_VAR_01")
   or ( filterName[j].id === "Z_QUERY_VAR_02")
   or ( filterName[j].id === "Z_QUERY_VAR_03")
  ){   console.log("++FOUND IT - DO SOMEOPERATIONS ON IT+++");
   }
else { console.log("+++DID NOT FOUND IT - DO NO OPERATIONS ON IT");
}
 
ERROR CREATED
The scriplet raises a browser console error:

Fehler beim Validieren in "MANAGREP.onResultChanged":
Sie haben ein unerwartetes Zeichen eingegeben. Überprüfen Sie Ihr Skript. (8, 46)
Fehlendes Semikolon (8, 87)
Fehlendes Semikolon (8, 131)
Sie haben ein unerwartetes Zeichen eingegeben. Überprüfen Sie Ihr Skript. (8, 133)
Sie haben ein unerwartetes Zeichen eingegeben. Überprüfen Sie Ihr Skript. (12, 4)
Sie haben ein unerwartetes Zeichen eingegeben. Überprüfen Sie Ihr Skript. (16, 0)
"or" ist eine unbekannte Variable. (8, 45)
"or" ist keine Funktion. (8, 45)
"or" ist eine unbekannte Variable. (8, 89)
"or" ist keine Funktion. (8, 89)

LOGICAL BACKGROUND:
For the 3 variables a further processing with 

var filterValuesFISCYEAR02 = MANAGREP.getDataSource().getVariableValues("ZMO_VAR_FISCYEAR02")[0];
switch(filterValuesFISCYEAR02.type){
case VariableValueType.Single:
var singlefilterValue = cast(Type.SingleVariableValue, filterValuesFISCYEAR02 );

...

is required and this does not accept the multiple call of the same code.

Any idea who to work arround of this ?

ThanXs:
Best Martin

entry.title: Re: OVR/INS
entry.content: Insert or Overwrite. It relates to what functionality you want in a field.

entry.title: Re: SAC Script has got no IF (... OR ...) ?
entry.content: Solved, || will do it, but where is the doku for all the other cases ? if( ( filterName[j].id === "Z_QUERY_VAR_01") || ( filterName[j].id === "Z_QUERY_VAR_02") || ( filterName[j].id === "Z_QUERY_VAR_03") )

entry.title: Query Manager, Parameters, dropdown list
entry.content:
When asking for the parameters, if the field has these "Contraint values" Like in JDT1 on field TransType. it generates a dropdown list on the parameter.

Is there anywhere i can set these on a table, or when creating a new table, a way to input this valid values?
via SQL for hana db.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan scheduling planned Dates wrong calcu...
entry.content:
Here logic is calculating or adjusted 1 day by scheduling 53 rd call. 

As weekly 7 days and here schedule period is 365 days, you can consider 364 days , may logic will work accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Avalara Configuration in SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I'm trying to find information about how to update BYD for sales/use taxes as reported by Avalara, including the payment drafted from the bank account of my client.  Also there is an AvataxConfiguration work center where data resides and looks like we can reconcile BYD to Avalara, or indeed update Avalara for new exempt customers ---- but there are no help docs on it on Avalara site or SAP.COM.  I've submitted a case to SAP on behalf of client but any real-world advice from one who has done this prior would be helpful.  Thanks so much!   

Carol Casey

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content: Then you can use your union select, and use the select from EINA for the first and select EINE inner join EINA for the second part.

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content: That's exactly what I did, are you sure you read my post carefully? My problem is on the MATNR field of the EINE table.

entry.title: Alt Condition base value
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I have requirement where I need to calculate condition value on 2 different parameters, like If a customer is retailer i need to calculate condition value on Gross price and if the customer is Distributor then calculate on Net price.

I hope this can be achieved through a formula routine in Alt Condition base value.

If KUNNR = R then KWERT = KZWI1 grossprice else KWERT = KZWI2.

Need your expert advise.

entry.title: Re: pMRP - Predictive Material and Resource Planning in SAP S/4HANA : Step by Step execution
entry.content:
Thank you for the information; it's very helpful.

I have a question regarding cost simulation. The LTP offers cost simulation capabilities. Does pMRP have similar functionality for cost simulations? Additionally, does SAP have any plans or a roadmap for integrating budgeting or cost simulation features into this functionality? - Many thanks

entry.title: Re: CDS View entity union all: take the value of a field from table EINA to table EINE
entry.content:
I think of something like that:

define view entity ZC_EinaEineUnion as select from eina
{
  key eina.infnr,
  'EINA' as TableSource,
   eina.matnr
}
union all select from eine
inner join eina on eina.infnr = eine.infnr
{
  key eine.infnr,
  'EINE' as TableSource,
  eina.matnr
}

entry.title: Detailed Phased approach for BW/4HANA In-place conversion across landscapes
entry.content:
We have a few general questions about the Phased approach option for the BW/4HANA In-place conversion across the system landscapes. We are confused about the attached image that shows a four phased approach where you would Convert the Development System, Transport and test scenario in Test, and then Transport and Go-live with Scenario in Production. So, our confusion is when we Transport our Phase 1 to Production and our Process chains run that evening in prod, will the converted objects load data from the new ODP data-sources, and the non-converted objects load data from the old SAPI data-sources.

Additionally, can we assume that during Phase 1, when we start the conversion of objects in the (STC01) Conversion Task List and we run into issues, we will fix and collect those objects into a Transport request and continue until the conversion is complete.

Then, we will Transport those requests from Dev to QA, and we will again convert those same objects using (STC01) in QA. 

Thanks, 

Norm

entry.title: Re: Debit and Credits Report for Bank Reconciliation Configuration OT83 Posting Rules
entry.content: I was able to resolve it this way: find every unique transaction using bank account, debit/credit as -/+, then transaction type code. From there, I was able to engineer backgrounds from assign external transactions, to posting rules.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Kolkata
entry.content: Recently I have joined SAP academic community conference India at SAP Lab Bangalore. Happy to meet with professional and explore SAP BTP & SAP business AI. Interest to join here.

entry.title: SWPM SAPHANADB cannot be set during Primary Application Server installation
entry.content:
This is a new installation.
Installing S4Hana 2023 on Hana 2.0 using SWPM 2.0 sp18.
The ASCS was installed, the database installed and now installing the Primary Application Server.

In the define parameters phase it asks for the Database Schema password.
The schema name is already filled in and grayed out with SAPHANADB.
The guide says to just specify a password for SAPHANADB.
The schema does not yet exist in the database, as mentioned this is just the Define Parameters phase so nothing has been executed yet.

This error shows up:
The database connection with database user SAPHANADB cannot be set up. Check that the database is online and the password of user SAPHANADB is correct.

 

The installed database is up and available.

Have tried various iterations of password letters/numbers/length and also mimicked the basic password policy of the Master Password.
The install logs shows errors  INVALID_USER_PASSWORD and also 'authentication failed'.

Wondering if that's the actual error as the user doesn't exist yet, how can the password be invalid and authentication fail if it's just going to create the user?

Log excerpt with server name, port and SID mocked up.
Fri Jul 26 21:26:51 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Start new command section
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.core.jar | Changelist: 212394 | Release: lmts_027_REL | API-Version: 00
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.jar | Changelist: 213789 | Release: lmts_027_REL | API-Version: 35
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Name of HdbCmdClazz: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcDriver | URI: file:/tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/DISTRIBUTED/ABAP/APP1/ngdbc.jar
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Instance is a multiple-container system.
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://<server_name>.mikl.com:<port>/?databaseName=<SID> connect user: SAPHANADB
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible | HDBSLLIB Exception: [INVALID_USER_PASSWORD] com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.SQLInvalidAuthorizationSpecExceptionSapDB: [10]: authentication failed
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | End of HdbCmdClazz section: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.IsConnectPossible
Fri Jul 26 21:26:52 CDT 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

Any feedback appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Thailand Export Control
entry.content: Try DFT export control. Most of their rules are around plants and food and some pharmaceuticals.

entry.title: Failed to compile web version
entry.content:
I tried several times but if successful, I can't export it to the web version.

Runtime version: 4.11.132;
AB version: 2.12.0
COMMAND:

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template- standalone@4.11.132 -r

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.132 -r


App ID 123687


App ID 123687

entry.title: Re: Trying to access XSA UAA via browser and getting The...
entry.content:
When trying to access the XSA UAA (SAP HANA Extended Services, Advanced User Account and Authentication) via a browser and encountering the error message "The subdomain does not map to a valid identity zone," it typically indicates a configuration issue. Here are steps you can take to troubleshoot and resolve this problem:

  • Check the URL
  • Verify Subdomain and Identity Zone Configuration
  • Check XSA Configuration
  • Check UAA ConfigurationDNS Configuration
  • Logs and Diagnostics
  • Restart Services
  • Contact Support

entry.title: Confirmation that linking carrier to route is not possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear, 

We are investigating if linking the carrier to a certain route is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
According to us there is no way to do this. 

We have the possibility to filter by "service agent" when selecting the route in the Sales document, but there is no way to do the link via the configuration or master data.

Please see screenshot attached. 

Can you please indicate if our investigation is correct and if any alternative solutions are available?

Thanks. 

Kr
Joost


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Confirmation that linking carrier to route is not pos...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I don't see any standard customizing to link the carrier and route at S/4HANA Cloud System.

But if you want determine route according to carrier when creating SO, you may consider BADI like SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM - Modification of Item Custom Fields in Sales Documents.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am using SAP Trial account on my personal PC ( not corporate VPN), but i still get "Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed by peer" while connecting to hana cloud DB.

Kindly suggest how we can resolve this. .

 

Thanks,

Kris

entry.title: Re: Task 9 - Using CQL in an unbound action (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
@qmacro 

OK - now that your interest was piqued - here is what I did.

I took the communityid and using the spread operator, spread it from a String into an array of individual characters.

Noting that the map() method of an Array creates a new array populated with the results of calling a provided function on every element in the calling array, I used map with a function to convert to lower case and then determine the numeric value of each of the elements. ( the "characters").

The reduce() method of an Array executes a user-supplied "reducer" callback function on each element of the array, passing in the return value from the calculation on the preceding element "forwards". The final result of running the "reducer function" across all elements of the array is a single value. I used reduce to sum the numeric values into one single value. 

So here it is:

const theSum = [...communityid].map(b => b.toLowerCase().charCodeAt()).reduce( (a,b) => a + b )

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Kolkata

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Re: "Error: Connection failed (RTE:[89013] Socket closed...

entry.title: Re: Is the Application Job fiori app also available in BTP ABAP?
entry.content: Indexing of the question: BSP application NW_APS_APJ (NW Core Fiori UI for Application Jobs)

entry.title: Re: DOMAIN using UNIT data type
entry.content: Why don't you reuse the domain MEINS, or even the eponymous data element MEINS?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Consumption Model not visible in SAC
entry.content: Found it, you must have at least one perspective that is published. Switching from MS stock to SAP isn't always easy 🙂

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I am a 46 year old woman who is switching careers. I have obtained a Master of Science in AI, however, a degree alone is not enough without knowing how to use my knowledge in different clouds. SAP seems to be in demand and my chosen path is Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud.  Starting the learning today! Thankful in advance,

Dana
